articles.title: Marine Le Pen found guilty, but court clears way for presidential run if she wears tag
articles.summary: The National Rally leader now has to decide whether she will run with an electronic tag and will speak on TV later.

articles.title: Zelensky presses Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
articles.summary: The Ukrainian president says "decisions for air defence" should be "one of the key outcomes" of this week's summit in Turkey.

articles.title: Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
articles.summary: Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast.

articles.title: Lawyer says detained Gaza doctor was severely beaten in Israeli jail
articles.summary: The lawyer for Dr Hussam Abu Safiya tells the BBC his client was so badly beaten he could not recognise him during a visit last week.

articles.title: Jailers and officials at Russia's 'torture prisons' in Ukraine exposed by BBC
articles.summary: Former prisoners accuse the men of abuse in detention centres and want to see them brought to trial.

articles.title: Ghana halts visit by South African president amid row over anti-migrant protests
articles.summary: Many in Ghana feared his presence would lead to mass protests, and officials say it is postponed for now.

articles.title: Watch: Moment rare tornado lashes central Chinese cities
articles.summary: Videos shared with the BBC show debris flying through the air as the storm swept through Ezhou and Huanggang in Hubei province.

articles.title: Bomb explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
articles.summary: As reports of the blasts came in, state television said the Syrian president had welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.

articles.title: China sentences official to death for taking $325m in bribes
articles.summary: The 69-year-old helped companies secure valuable contracts in exchange for money, a court heard.

articles.title: Zimbabwean football star survives gun attack in South Africa
articles.summary: South African police say they are investigating a case of attempted murder but that no arrests have been made so far.
